title: wahlenbergia tenella var. stokoei
intro: Wahlenbergia tenella var. stokoei, also known as the New Zealand bluebell or Stokoe's bluebell, is a flowering plant in the bellflower family that is native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Wahlenbergia tenella var. stokoei include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory infections and digestive problems.
